name: magento
description: MCP for Magento 2 REST APIs - sales analytics widgets, orders, catalog, customers, inventory and CMS

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n api,web -c magenta,cyan "bun run dev:api" "bun run dev:web"
scripts.dev:web: bun run build:web && concurrently -n timeline,sales,cancel,top,status "MCP_APP_ENTRY=orders-timeline MCP_APP_EMPTY_OUTDIR=false vite build --watch" "MCP_APP_ENTRY=orders-sales-card MCP_APP_EMPTY_OUTDIR=false vite build --watch" "MCP_APP_ENTRY=cancellation-rate MCP_APP_EMPTY_OUTDIR=false vite build --watch" "MCP_APP_ENTRY=top-products MCP_APP_EMPTY_OUTDIR=false vite build --watch" "MCP_APP_ENTRY=status-breakdown MCP_APP_EMPTY_OUTDIR=false vite build --watch"
scripts.build:web: MCP_APP_ENTRY=orders-timeline MCP_APP_EMPTY_OUTDIR=true vite build && MCP_APP_ENTRY=orders-sales-card MCP_APP_EMPTY_OUTDIR=false vite build && MCP_APP_ENTRY=cancellation-rate MCP_APP_EMPTY_OUTDIR=false vite build && MCP_APP_ENTRY=top-products MCP_APP_EMPTY_OUTDIR=false vite build && MCP_APP_ENTRY=status-breakdown MCP_APP_EMPTY_OUTDIR=false vite build
scripts.build: bun run build:web && bun run build:server
